title: Admins can't interact with Microsoft Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center
impact: Admins can't interact with Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center.

updates.content:
Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft Intune

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Microsoft Intune and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Admins can't interact with Microsoft Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center

User impact: Admins can't interact with Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center.

More info: Affected admins may see Intune Suite features are available within the Intune admin center user interface but will be unable to utilize these features.

Current status: We've determined that a code issue introduced within a recent rollout of Intune Suite features to new license types is impacting the UI flow for organizations still being validated for these features, resulting in features being displayed to admins that aren't yet able to utilize them. We're implementing code changes to address this discrepancy and we aim to provide a timeline to remediation as soon as possible.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and admins see Intune Suite features in the Intune admin center that they're unable to access. This section may be updated as the investigation progresses.

Root cause: A code issue introduced within a recent rollout of Intune Suite features to new license types is impacting the UI flow for organizations still being validated for these features, resulting in features being displayed to admins that aren't yet able to utilize them.

Next update by: Thursday, June 18, 2026, at 8:30 PM UTC
